title: Phage lambda genome concatemerization
author: Marijn Ceelen

steps_raw.instruction: Add the following ingredients in a microcentrifuge tube. %s %s Ingredient Amount Ligation buffer 10X 2 µL DNA 6 µg PEG 4000 (40% W/W) 2.5 µL T4 DNA ligase 1 µ L (400 Weiss units) Water To 20 µL
